turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Seeking Technical Support for a Device or Service

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Seeking Technical Support for a Device or Service “ Hi, I bought a cell phone here last week but it gave a problem, I have a warranty, how do I solve this problem? “

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I can help with that. What kind of problem is the phone having right now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: The cell phone screen turns black and not turn on, I tried to change charger and it's still the same

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for explaining. Does the phone show any lights, vibration, or sound at all when you try to turn it on?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Nothing

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, got it. About how long ago did this start happening, and did anything unusual happen before the screen went black, like a drop or getting wet?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Soon when I bought it on the 3rd day, I didn't get it wet or knocked it down

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for clarifying. Do you still have the receipt or proof of purchase with you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes I have but it’s no In my name

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, that’s fine. Was the phone bought here in the store, or was it purchased online through us?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: On line

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks. Do you have the order number or the email used to place the online order?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes I have a e-mail: it is lemessouza.233@gmail.com

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, thanks. Do you also have the order number from that email so I can locate the purchase quickly?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes of course

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, perfect. Could you please tell me the order number from the email?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thanks. Can you confirm the phone model you ordered so I can check the warranty and replacement options?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: iPhone 17

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks. Would you prefer a replacement phone or a repair under the warranty?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: The same please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, no problem. Could you please confirm the delivery address so we can send the replacement iPhone 17 to you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I can get in the store?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, that’s possible. Which store location would you like to pick it up from?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: You could tell me the adresse the store?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Which city are you in, so I can give you the correct store address?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Is São Paulo

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Our São Paulo store is at Avenida Paulista, 1230 – Bela Vista, São Paulo. When would you like to come in to pick up the replacement?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Today, thank you so much !!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re welcome! Please bring your phone, the receipt, and the order email with you today. We’ll be ready to help when you arrive—see you soon 😊

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ok, see you!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, see you later! Have a safe trip to the store 😊
